# Skill: lock-tag

## Purpose
Close the sprint: promote the approved proposal to the canonical charter, tag the repository, and update all memory documents.

## Trigger
Human invokes this skill from `LOOP.md` Step 6 (Lock, Tag, Retrospective) after final validation approval.

## Inputs
- Approved `docs/charter_evolution/PROPOSAL_WAVE_<N>.md`
- `docs/charter_evolution/POLYCENTRIC_CHARTER_v0.1.md` (or latest canonical version)
- `memory/project-state.md`
- `memory/decision-registry.md`
- `memory/failure-registry.md`

## Steps
1. Apply all approved changes from `PROPOSAL_WAVE_<N>.md` to the canonical charter file, incrementing the version number (e.g. v0.1 → v0.2).
2. Save the updated charter as `docs/charter_evolution/POLYCENTRIC_CHARTER_v<new>.md`.
3. Update `memory/project-state.md`:
   - Set `Active Charter` to the new version.
   - Set `Current Sprint Goal` to the next sprint's goal (or "TBD" if not yet set).
   - Record completion timestamp.
4. Append a new entry to `memory/decision-registry.md` summarising what was locked and why.
5. Append a retrospective entry to `memory/failure-registry.md` noting any process gaps or near-misses.
6. Present the full set of changes for human review and final commit signoff.
7. After human commit, create a Git tag: `sprint-<N>-locked`.

## Outputs
- Updated canonical charter (`POLYCENTRIC_CHARTER_v<new>.md`)
- Updated `memory/project-state.md`
- Updated `memory/decision-registry.md`
- Updated `memory/failure-registry.md`
- Git tag `sprint-<N>-locked`

## No API calls
All content is generated by the human-controlled AI agent reading local files only. No external endpoints are contacted.
